{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321130233D928F8469FE936CC2968\"}"},"total":19547},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7089455705878905632","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"怎么说呢，其实也不算水，感觉就是写得很细节，写得很有想法，有一种在读一篇大作的感觉，作者的知识储备也很足，哎呀我也不会形容，就是感觉这个文章它很让人捉摸不透，猜不到他下一步要做什么，猜不到下一步会写到什么，猜不到下一步又与之前哪一个细节相连接起来，这本书的作者的确很厉害，第一次看这文就是照着爽文来的，结果变成了大型科普类型的甄嬛传，这本书我很喜欢，就是太不够看了，太想知道下一步谁又中套了，一天两张，我四五分钟就看完了，我也不知道作者写这两张要写多长时间，可能俩小时也有可能三个小时，但是我还是希望作者能够坚持下去，不要半途不写了，加油","text_exts":[{"e":166,"s":163,"text":"甄嬛传","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E7%94%84%E5%AC%9B%E4%BC%A0\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177406935336CC2968%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227089455705878905632%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226589956576767904775%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%94%84%E5%AC%9B%E4%BC%A0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1650642542,"group_id":"6589956576767904775","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9Si0yjWGc5Bkm7PetJdJcg3jtOi20WqJOroJZgLqhJq","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776614448\u0026x-signature=77B3F2V9HxLK4vsnQuBSstH5PAo%3D","user_id":"3281357184183335","user_name":"玄武殿的紫青"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3281357184183335","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6589956576767904775","book_info":{"abstract":"“一代仙尊”洛尘遭人偷袭，重生回到地球。地位普通的他，面对女朋友的鄙视，情敌的嘲讽，父母的悲惨生活，豪门大少的威逼挑衅。他发誓，一定要改变命运的不公，站在这个世界的巅峰，告诉所有人，他洛尘，曾经来过。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/a501504001e855af2a318a3f9a75537d","author":"洛书","author_id":"","book_id":"6589956576767904775","book_name":"重生之都市仙尊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0d8d8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":124,\"name\":\"都市修真\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124\u0026name=都市修真\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":36,\"name\":\"重生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36\u0026name=重生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":373,\"name\":\"西游衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373\u0026name=西游衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6589973162245489159","read_count":"94749","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"12528966"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"6105","tags":"都市修真,西游衍生,都市,重生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/a14800049bad192bf1fc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779253353\u0026x-signature=PVojZv1QIbxeZ7dV0t4VCXpUD2w%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"9.9185993e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321130233D928F8469FE936CC2968\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读28小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":435,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":99185,"reply_count":33,"show_pv":86375},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6804701332004438030","common":{"comment_type":2,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"洛书的文笔很不错，对全书的把握也非常好，虽然都市文里加入了玄幻文的元素，但是并没有衔接不上的感觉，反而过渡的十分自然，这足以说明洛书的写作功底很棒，唯一的缺点就是更新稍微有点慢，支持洛书！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1584105261,"group_id":"6589956576767904775","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"你没有如期而至，而这正是离别的意义。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9hHNv5ZlIrPCo6ozg3My9pF9ZMplgMPzWFg9WS3OGKb","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/c2abf92a0ebe4f059255d012e612dfbb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776615249\u0026x-signature=r7sbYB7rflpcyM5ilS0Ol0n3aEQ%3D","user_id":"2963899463773422","user_name":"Timor陈医生"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2963899463773422","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6589956576767904775","book_info":{"abstract":"“一代仙尊”洛尘遭人偷袭，重生回到地球。地位普通的他，面对女朋友的鄙视，情敌的嘲讽，父母的悲惨生活，豪门大少的威逼挑衅。他发誓，一定要改变命运的不公，站在这个世界的巅峰，告诉所有人，他洛尘，曾经来过。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/a501504001e855af2a318a3f9a75537d","author":"洛书","author_id":"","book_id":"6589956576767904775","book_name":"重生之都市仙尊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0d8d8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":124,\"name\":\"都市修真\",\"schema\":\"drag
